name: Orange Roughy Under Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut orange roughy into 8 portions and set aside.
2. Melt the margarine in a pan and add flour, stirring until well blended.
3. Mix in remaining ingredients, stirring over low heat until thickened.
4. Broil orange roughy 4 inches from heat until fresh flakes when tested with a fork.
5. Pour orange sauce over the fish and serve immediately.
